# 👋 Hi, I'm David Melton

**Senior AI Infrastructure Engineer | Full-Stack Developer | Cost Optimization Specialist**

Building production-grade systems that make AI more accessible and cost-effective.

---

## 🚀 What I'm Building

### [Cost Melt](https://github.com/dmeltonyan/costmelt) - LLM Cost Optimization Platform

A complete, production-ready monorepo that reduces AI token costs by 40-70% through:

- **Intelligent Model Routing** - Complexity-based routing to optimal LLM models
- **Semantic Caching** - Vector-based similarity search for instant cache hits
- **Prompt Compression** - 20-50% token reduction while preserving meaning
- **Micro-Batching** - Request batching for improved throughput and cost efficiency
- **Real-time Analytics** - Comprehensive dashboard with cost tracking and savings visualization

**Tech Stack:** FastAPI, Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, Redis, Docker, Python, React

**Key Achievements:**
- ✅ Full-stack monorepo with 149+ files, 22K+ lines of production code
- ✅ Production-grade authentication & security (API keys, RBAC, rate limiting)
- ✅ Complete SDKs for Python and Node.js
- ✅ Comprehensive documentation (API, Security, Deployment, Benchmarks)
- ✅ Load testing suite (Locust, k6, profiling tools)
- ✅ Dockerized deployment (Railway, Render, AWS ECS ready)
